title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0132 Cotham School, Cotham Lawn Road, Bristol, BS6 6DT
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  Cotham School  Site address:  Cotham School, Cotham Lawn Road, Bristol, BS6 6DT  Description of proposed development:  Works to install 9 no. floodlight columns around the MUGA and AW pitches at Cotham School with associated planting and works.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 3 November 2025   Date by when representations must be made 4 December 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 29 December 2025   Decision date 15 December 2025     Decision   Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons  (PDF, 156 KB, 7 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 4 December 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0132 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Form  (PDF, 2.02 MB, 14 pages)  BCC BNG Screening Assessment - Inc. Mandatory BNG Statement and Exemption Statement - Cotham School  (PDF, 453 KB, 8 pages)  BR0134-VIDA-XX-XX-DR-0901 7m columns  (PDF, 1.96 MB, 3 pages)  BR0134-VIDA-XX-XX-RP-S1-0001 P3 - Lighting Assessment  (PDF, 2.58 MB, 11 pages)  Cotham School Floodlighting - Planting Plan  (PDF, 590 KB, 1 page)  Cotham School Floodlights - TPP-1  (PDF, 216 KB, 1 page)  Cotham School Pitch Floodlighting - Townscape and Visual Impact Assessment Rev A  (PDF, 70.5 MB, 39 pages)  7Mtr Standard Column - Lampost-24-02388-LP-001.  (PDF, 338 KB, 1 page)  23-00812 ESL01 Existing Site Layout  (PDF, 77.3 KB, 1 page)  23-00812 PSL01 Proposed Site Layout  (PDF, 101 KB, 1 page)  23-00812 SLP04 Site Location Plan  (PDF, 56.5 KB, 1...
